# pexip_infinity_autobackup (Resource)

Manages the Pexip Infinity automatic backup configuration. This is a singleton resource — only one instance exists.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `autobackup_enabled` (Boolean) Enable automatic creation of daily configuration backups.
- `autobackup_interval` (Number) The number of hours between running an automatic backup. Range: 1 to 24. Default: 24.
- `autobackup_passphrase` (String, Sensitive) The passphrase used to encrypt all automatically generated backup files. Maximum length: 100 characters.
- `autobackup_start_hour` (Number) The hour (in UTC time) to run the automatic backup. Range: 0 to 23. Default: 1.
- `autobackup_upload_password` (String, Sensitive) The password for the upload URL. Maximum length: 100 characters.
- `autobackup_upload_url` (String) The URL to which to upload automatic backups. Supported schemes: FTPS, FTP. Maximum length: 255 characters.
- `autobackup_upload_username` (String) The username for the upload URL. Maximum length: 100 characters.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the autobackup configuration in Infinity.
